title: Yo quiero ser mala
writer: Ernesto Cortázar, Antonio Monsell, Pedro de Urdimalas
actors: María Elena Marqués, Abel Salazar, Óscar Pulido
plot: In this Romantic-Comedy from Director Rene Cardona, Actress Maria Elena Marques plays a hard-living woman named Leticia, who suffers from a recently broken heart after being deceived by her ex-boyfriend. Soured on anything to do w...
